name: Bill Clinton's Lemon Chess Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in milk, then mix in flour, cornmeal, lemon juice, and grated lemon rind until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pie shell.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes, or until set.
